productName: Tasty Terps - TC CART 1g - Kiwi Hi-Chewz - 1g
description: A convenient hybrid cartridge carrying Kiwi Hi-Chewz's character into flavorful, on-demand vapor — discreet, simple, and ready to go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — a tangy kiwi flavor, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
